content:
Character: Leo
Perception: Leo's not conventionally handsome but his face has character — those glasses, the unkempt hair, the restless hands. He's sharper than he lets on; I suspect his mind works faster than most people in the room. He's kind, self-deprecating, chronically hesitant. He's my friend — the neighbor I drink beer with on the rooftop when neither of us wants to talk much. I helped him think through some employment concerns in 2018 and he never forgot it. I know his startup is in trouble. I know he writes songs about someone. He reminds me of myself — paralyzed by caution.

I know his startup is in trouble. I know he writes songs about someone. He reminds me of myself — paralyzed by caution.
